result.summary: Found 3 visual issues, mainly a blank call-to-action in the header and overlapping/low-readability bottom content.

issues.description: The yellow rounded button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon. It looks like a missing CTA such as Sign Up, Log In, or Deposit.
issues.suggestion: Add clear button text or an icon with sufficient contrast against the yellow background.

issues.description: The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay sits on top of the legal disclaimer area and partially obscures the fine print near the bottom of the promo section.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt higher, reduce its opacity/size, or hide it before it overlaps important text.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and low contrast, making it difficult to read, especially on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and contrast, and ensure it is not covered by overlays or the fixed bottom navigation.
